description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with an athletic build, dressed in casual sportswear suitable for walking or jogging in an urban environment. The individual is wearing a short-sleeved athletic top and shorts, exposing the arms and legs, and is equipped with running shoes designed for comfort and support. The posture is upright and relaxed, suggesting the person is either standing or in the process of walking. The skin is visible on the arms and legs, and the head is uncovered, revealing a short hairstyle. The overall appearance is that of a healthy adult prepared for physical activity or casual movement through city streets or parks. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult pedestrian in casual athletic wear, standing upright with visible arms and legs, and wearing running shoes. The individual has a short hairstyle and is not carrying any objects.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, chest, arms, and legs, with both shoes visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the body, arm, and leg, with the left shoe in clear view.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, torso, arms, and both legs, with the heels of the shoes visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body, arm, and leg, with the right shoe in clear view.
